title: The Black Cat Plot Tightens Around Kaya
description: On pages 1–4, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: "Assassinate" is such an ugly word!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Ah! Yeah! Accident! We'll call it an accident!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Isn't that right captain KURO?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain Kuro..... I gave up that name 3 years ago,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Don't call me by that name again!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You are the captain now!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey, what are those two talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You heard them your- self, why are you asking me?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I think I've heard the name captain Kuro somewhere....

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I think he's the pirate famous for his careful planning before rubbing and plunder- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But I heard he got caught by the marines three years ago, and got exe- cuted...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I still remember- her that day...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It simply shocked me...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You said you were going to give up being a pirate,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And made me the captain!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Everyone thinks that Captain Kuro has been exe- cuted by the marines!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But actu- ally, you hid in this little village,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And told us to come here in three year's time

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: before, when I worked for you, there were always a lot of "benefits"

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's the only reason I worked for you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I can get a good share this time right?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If you succeed, you'll get your share!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Good! Leave that girl to me!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Killing her is not enough...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You have to make sure it looks like an accident!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It looks like you're not ready yet!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Shutup! I'm com- pletely ready!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: When you send the signal, we'll charge into the village...

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: ...and kill the Ojousama, simple as that!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Then you can openly claim her inheri- Lance

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I wonder if your mom actually gave you a brain!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I have no relation to her family, how can there be inheritance for me?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
